page is for developers and is about how to upload the accessors package to the Node Package Manager (npm). Testing To test the package before uploading it, do cd $PTII mkdir node_modules npm install org / terraswarm / accessor / accessors / web [$[G

org / terraswarm / accessor / accessors / web [$[Get Code]] What this does is read $PTII/org/terraswarm/accessor/accessors/web/package.json and create $PTII/node_modules/@terraswarm/accessors/ . How to upload For this to work, you will need the terra

o upload For this to work, you will need the terraswarm npm password. (See Accounts (group access only) and look in ealprivi/passwords/terra-npmjs.txt ) cd accessors/web Increment the version number in accessors/web/package.json . To upload a new ver

n accessors/web/package.json . To upload a new version of the module, npm requires that the version number be incremented. Login: bash-3.2$ npm login Username: terraswarm Password: Email: ( this IS public ) terraswarm-software @ terraswarm.org Logged

blic ) terraswarm-software @ terraswarm.org Logged in as terraswarm on https: // registry.npmjs.org / . bash-3.2$ [$[Get Code]] Upload: bash-3.2$ pwd / Users / cxh / ptII / org / terraswarm / accessor / accessors / web bash-3.2$ npm publish --access

/ accessors / web bash-3.2$ npm publish --access =public + @ terraswarm / accessors @ 0.0.13 bash-3.2$ [$[Get Code]] Upload Synopsis Below is roughly how the upload occurred. This information is mainly for debugging. Created an account via https://

nly for debugging. Created an account via https://www.npmjs.com/signup Created accessors/web/package.js by running npm init . See Using A Package (npmjs.com docs) Edited accessors/web/package.js by hand and added some items after reviewing the jshin

and and added some items after reviewing the jshints package.js file. { "name" : "@terraswarm/accessors" , "version" : "0.0.1" , "description" : "Actor-oriented proxies for IoT" , "main" : "hosts/node/nodeHost.js" , "author" : { "name" : "Edward A. L

ors" } , "scripts" : { "test" : "echo \" Error: no test specified \" && exit 1" } , "license" : "SEE LICENSE IN accessors-license.htm" } [$[Get Code]] Things to notice "name": "@terraswarm/accessors", - The package is in the @terraswarm npm scope "ma

- The package is in the @terraswarm npm scope "main": "hosts/node/nodeHost.js", - The main file is located at this location. Ran npm login , and used my terraswarm credential, for the password, see https://wiki.eecs.berkeley.edu/ptolemy/Ptolemy/Acco

ttps://wiki.eecs.berkeley.edu/ptolemy/Ptolemy/Accounts Accounts (group access only)and look in ealprivi/passwords/terra-npmjs.txt . Ran npm publish --access=public , which published it. To test, see Installing Using NPM See Also Node Host - how to us
